history.summary: Adds the reproducible win64 Bottles setup and the confirmed installer DirectX engine repair, with launch, verification and research documentation.
Adds the confirmed GE-Proton runtime repair, restores runner-matched WineD3D support files, registers one clean Bottles launcher and documents the fixed-executable startup result.
Makes the launcher follow the real game process and clean up this bottle's lingering Wine desktop so launchers do not remain stuck after exit.
Adds a checksum-guarded, reversible executable patch that fixes the verified NBA Live 07 shutdown deadlock so Steam clears normally after menu exit.

Adds the confirmed native controller-profile fallback with source and reproducible binary, documents the complete dual-stick control scheme and special moves, and adds complete Steam library artwork setup.
